name: trailer
description: Canonical Hermes: Godspeed launch trailer source and render pipeline.

scripts.render: remotion render HermesGodspeedTrailer out/hermes-godspeed-launch-trailer.mp4 --codec=h264 --audio-codec=aac --concurrency=4 --log=warn && node scripts/verify-render.mjs
scripts.render:fresh: npm run sync-assets && npm run score && npm run capture && npm run lint && npm run render
